tasks.label: Flash STM32
tasks.command: openocd -f interface/stlink.cfg -f target/stm32f4x.cfg -c "program ${workspaceFolder}/build/Debug/lab8.elf verify reset exit"

tasks.label: Build & Flash STM32
tasks.command: /opt/homebrew/bin/cmake --build ${workspaceFolder}/build/Debug && openocd -f interface/stlink.cfg -f target/stm32f4x.cfg -c "program ${workspaceFolder}/build/Debug/lab8.elf verify reset exit"
